backup.framework.controlinputparameter.C: A list of parameters for a control. A control can have zero, one, or more than one parameter. An example of a control with two parameters is: "backup plan frequency is at least `daily` and the retention period is at least `1 year`". The first parameter is `daily`. The second parameter is `1 year`.

backup.framework.controlinputparameter.P.Description: The name of a parameter, for example, `BackupPlanFrequency`.
The value of parameter, for example, `hourly`.
